title: Stocks Tumble as Inflation Risk Emerges in Wake of Iran War
author: Joe Rennison and Jason Karaian
fullText: The S&P 500 slumped as investors retrenched from the unpredictable effects that the fighting could have on the world economy.
summary: The S&P 500 slumped as investors retrenched from the unpredictable effects that the fighting could have on the world economy.
